zh.Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾姆爾格拉福 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Thornham於1197年出生在英國越可爾姆爾格拉福 卡素時，她的父親Robert de Turnham III36歲，母親Joan Fossard22歲。她於大約1214年與Peter de Mauley I在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1238年1月22日在英國越可爾米奧享年41歲，埋葬在英國越可爾米奧。

zh-hans.Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾姆爾格拉福 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Thornham于1197年出生在英国越可爾姆爾格拉福 卡素时，她的父亲Robert de Turnham III36岁，母亲Joan Fossard22岁。她于大约1214年与Peter de Mauley I在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1238年1月22日在英国越可爾米奧享年41岁，埋葬在英国越可爾米奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thornham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: locative name from Thorneholme in Burton Agnes (ER Yorks), recorded as Thurnum in 1333.
2  English: locative name from Thornham (Norfolk), Thornham Magna and Parva (Suffolk), or Thurnham (Kent), and perhaps other places similarly named, such as Great and Little Thurnham (Lancs).

variants.name: Thorman
meanings: English (Durham and Nottinghamshire): variant of Thurman or Thornham. The latter is a habitational name, from either Thorneholme in Yorkshire or places called Thornham in Norfolk, Suffolk, Kent or Lancashire.
Americanized form of Danish and North German Thormann: elaborated form of the personal name Thor + -mann ‘man’.
Americanized form of German Thormann: topographic name for someone living at the (city) gate.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Thornham was born in 1197, in Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert de Turnham III, was 36 and her mother, Joan Fossard, was 22. She married Peter de Mauley I about 1214, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 22 January 1238, in Meaux, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Meaux, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Thornham est née en 1197, à Mulgrave Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Turnham III, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joan Fossard, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Peter de Mauley I environ 1214, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 janvier 1238, à Meaux, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Meaux, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Thornham 1197 in Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Turnham III 36 und ihre Mutter Joan Fossard 22. Sie hat um 1214 in Yorkshire, England Peter de Mauley I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Januar 1238 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Meaux, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Meaux, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Thornham è nata il nel 1197 nel Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Turnham III, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Joan Fossard, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Peter de Mauley I circa 1214, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 gennaio 1238, nel Meaux, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Meaux, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Thornhamが1197年にイギリスヨークシュアイアムルグラブ カストルで生まれた時，父Robert de Turnham IIIは36歳，母Joan Fossardは22歳であった。約1214年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでPeter de Mauley Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1238年1月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアメアウックスで41歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアメアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Thornham(이)가 1197년 영국 요르크실르 뮐그레이브 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Turnham III(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Fossard(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1214년 영국 요르크실르에서 Peter de Mauley I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1238년 1월 22일 영국 요르크실르 모스에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 모스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Thornham nasceu em 1197, em Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Turnham III, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Joan Fossard, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Peter de Mauley I aproximadamente 1214, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de janeiro de 1238, em Meaux, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Meaux, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Thornham родилась в 1197 г. в местности мулграв кастл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Turnham III было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Fossard, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter de Mauley I около 1214 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 января 1238 г. в местности мокс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности мокс, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Thornham nació en 1197, en Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Turnham III, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Joan Fossard, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Peter de Mauley I aproximadamente 1214, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de enero de 1238, en Meaux, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Meaux, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
